heading: Ancon Hospital to be known as Gorgas Hospital
label: 301 Ancon Hospital to be known as Gorgas Hospital
text: In recognition of his distinguished services to humanity and as a fitting perpetuation of the name and memory of Major General William Crawford Gorgas, the Government hospital within the Canal Zone, near the City of Panama, known prior to , as the Ancon Hospital, shall after such date be known and designated on the public records as the Gorgas Hospital.March 24, 1928
notes: References in TextFor definition of Canal Zone, referred to in text, see , Foreign Relations and Intercourse.section 3602(b) of Title 22
